description_long: This is a cream-colored ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle. The front of the cup features a bold, playful design with the phrase 'I ♥ MOM' in black and red lettering, making it a sentimental or gift item. The surface of the cup is mostly smooth with a matte finish, and there are a few subtle scuff marks and stains, suggesting some use or age. The rim is slightly thickened, providing structural strength and a comfortable lip for drinking. The handle is ergonomically shaped, allowing for an easy grip. The interior appears to be the same color as the exterior, and the cup is open at the top, suitable for holding liquids.
description: A cream-colored ceramic cup with a handle and 'I ♥ MOM' text on the front, featuring a smooth matte finish and subtle wear marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'I ♥ MOM' text and the handle on the left side.
description_view_1: Back view displaying the plain cream surface with no text or handle visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the right, showing the cup's smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and a partial glimpse of the front text.
